import pandas as pd
import numpy as np


def compute_discount(df):
    df["discount"] = df["price"] * 0.1
    return df


def classify_age(df):
    df["age_group"] = np.where(df["age"] >= 18, "adult", "minor")
    return df


def compute_full_name(df):
    df["full_name"] = df["first"] + " " + df["last"]
    return df


def normalize_scores(df):
    mean = df["score"].mean()
    std = df["score"].std()
    df["normalized"] = (df["score"] - mean) / std
    return df
